data.title: Bank of America declares dividends on preferred stock for October and November 2025 in Charlotte, NC.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Bank of America Corporation revealed that its Board of Directors has approved regular cash dividends for the outstanding shares of preferred stock. The dividends will be distributed on the specified series of preferred stock, with each share receiving a designated amount. The announcement signifies the commitment of the company to provide returns to its shareholders.

data.title: PharmAla files restated prospectus to raise funds, effective for 25 months, focused on MDXX class molecules.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, PharmAla Biotech Holdings Inc. (CSE: MDMA) (OTC:MDXXF) announced the filing of an amended preliminary short form base shelf prospectus to allow for potential financing opportunities during the 25-month Effective Period. The company, focusing on MDXX class molecules development, including LaNeo™ MDMA, aims to capitalize on favorable market conditions. Interested parties can access the Prospectus on the company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca.

data.title: Southside Bank CEO Lee Gibson to retire on December 31, 2025; Keith Donahoe to take over with 30 years of banking experience.
data.description: In Tyler, Texas, on September 19, 2025, it was reported that Southside Bancshares, Inc. and Southside Bank will see the retirement of Lee Gibson, the Chief Executive Officer and director of both entities, as of December 31, 2025. Following his retirement, Mr. Gibson will remain a director of both the Company and the Bank. Keith Donahoe, the current President of the Company and the Bank with more than 30 years of experience in banking, is set to take over as CEO.
US BANK DEPOSITS ROSE TO $18.413 TLN FROM $18.401 TLN IN PRIOR WEEK

data.title: Wall Street hits record highs as Fed cuts rates, hints at more cuts. S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, Dow Jones, Russell 2000 all closed at all-time highs. Fed cut rates by 25 basis points to 4%–4.25%. Fed Governor argued against the decision.
data.description: Wall Street reached new record heights following the Federal Reserve's announcement of a 25 basis points interest rate cut at its September meeting, marking the first cut in nine months. This suggests the potential for further rate reductions in the future. The VOO ETF also achieved all-time highs this week. The S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, Dow Jones, and Russell 2000 small-cap index all closed at record levels on Thursday, reflecting investor enthusiasm over the Fed's decision. The central bank's new target range stands at 4%–4.25%, with a focus on addressing a cooling labor market. The move was not unanimous, as Fed Gov. Stephen Miran dissented. For more details, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.
THE SECRETARY OF HOMELAND SECURITY IS TERMINATING THE DESIGNATION OF SYRIA FOR TEMPORARY PROTECTED STATUS - DHS STATEMENT

data.title: FCPT buys Left Lane Auto property for $3M in Calif, expanding portfolio. Autorepair chain has 67 units in 13 states.
data.description: Located in Mill Valley, California, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE: FCPT) has recently acquired the Left Lane Auto property for $3.0 million. This real estate investment trust focuses on owning and acquiring high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties. Left Lane Auto is a prominent auto service operator with 67 units spread across 13 states under different brands. The company primarily operates auto repair shops.

data.title: NIBS takes over management of Sustainable Facilities Tool (SFTool) for federal building innovation on Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: In a press release dated September 19, 2025, the National Institute of Building Sciences (NIBS) revealed that it has officially taken over the management and further enhancement of the Sustainable Facilities Tool (SFTool). This digital platform, highly regarded in sustainability circles, was initially created by the U.S. General Services Administration. The transition indicates a strategic move by NIBS to align itself as a leading organization in the field of sustainable infrastructure. This development marks a significant step in NIBS' commitment to advancing environmentally friendly practices in the construction sector.

data.title: BKV releases 2024 Sustainability Report post IPO,emphasizing progress in carbon reduction tech,globally.
data.description: In Denver, BKV Corporation (NYSE: BKV) recently unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report, showcasing its dedication to advancing carbon reduction technologies worldwide. This marks the Company's inaugural sustainability disclosure post IPO in September 2024. The report emphasizes BKV's strides in upholding its "Promise. Deliver. Repeat." ethos, underscoring its ongoing efforts in developing and implementing sustainable solutions in the global energy sector.

data.title: GENFIT discontinues VS-01 ACLF program; focuses on UCD; aims to improve rare liver disease care.
data.description: Today, GENFIT (GNFT), a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq and Euronext, revealed the halt of its VS-01 program for ACLF (Acute-on-Chronic Liver Failure) and shift in focus towards UCD (Urea Cycle Disorder) development. This decision impacts operations in Lille (France), Cambridge (Massachusetts, USA), and Zurich (Switzerland). GENFIT aims to enhance patient care for rare liver diseases through this strategic move.

data.title: Pinterest appoints Instacart CFO Emily Reuter to Board of Directors. Her experience will be valuable for Pinterest's global strategy.
data.description: Pinterest, Inc. revealed that Emily Reuter, current CFO of Instacart, has become a part of their Board of Directors starting September 18. The CEO of Pinterest, Bill Ready, praised her extensive background in growing major tech and e-commerce companies like Uber and Instacart. This addition is seen as crucial for Pinterest as they work towards solidifying their position as a global leader. Emily's expertise brings a wealth of knowledge to the boardroom, further enhancing the company's strategic initiatives.
FOUR SOLDIERS INVOLVED IN SEPT. 17 AIRCRAFT MISHAP BELIEVED TO BE DEAD - ARMY STATEMENT

data.title: Globus Maritime Limited reports Q2 financial results for the period ended June 30, 2025 with details on revenues and expenses.
data.description: In Glyfada, Greece, on September 19, 2025, Globus Maritime Limited shared its unaudited consolidated financial data for the second quarter and six months concluding on June 30, 2025. Operating as a dry bulk shipping enterprise under the NASDAQ ticker symbol GLBS, the company presented its financial performance for the stated periods.

data.title: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) declares quarterly dividend of $0.06 per share, payable on October 30, 2025.
data.description: Technology company Marvell Technology, Inc. based in Santa Clara, California, revealed on September 19, 2025, that they will be issuing a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per common stock share. This dividend is set to be paid on October 30, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as of October 10, 2025. Marvell focuses on providing data solutions to its customers, showcasing its commitment to advancing technological capabilities.

data.title: McGrath RentCorp declares $0.485 quarterly dividend for Q3 2025, payable on Oct 31 to shareholders of record on Oct 17.
data.description: LIVERMORE, California - McGrath RentCorp, a prominent business-to-business rental company in North America, has disclosed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.485 per common share for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2025. The dividend is scheduled to be distributed on October 31, 2025, to all shareholders listed on the records as of October 17, 2025. This year signifies the 34th successive annual increase in dividends by McGrath RentCorp.

data.title: Sun Communities, Inc. (NYSE: SUI) grants equity award to new CEO Charles D. Young.
data.description: In Southfield, MI on September 19, 2025, Sun Communities, Inc. (NYSE: SUI), a real estate investment trust specializing in manufactured housing and recreational vehicle communities, disclosed the allocation of an equity award to Charles D. Young, the new Chief Executive Officer.

data.title: Wintrust Financial Corporation to release Q3 and year-to-date 2025 earnings on Oct 20, 2025 after market close. Conference call on Oct 21 at 10:00 a.m. (CDT).
data.description: Wintrust Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: WTFC) based in Rosemont, Illinois, has disclosed plans to unveil their financial performance for the third quarter and year-to-date 2025 on October 20, 2025, post-market hours. This will be followed by a conference call scheduled for October 21, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (CDT). This communication is part of their regular practices to keep investors and stakeholders updated on the company's progress.

data.title: Mativ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: MATV) to participate in 2025 Deutsche Bank Leveraged Finance Conference in Austin, TX on October 14.
data.description: Mativ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: MATV) based in Alpharetta, Georgia revealed its involvement in the upcoming 2025 Deutsche Bank Leveraged Finance Conference to be held in Austin, Texas on October 14, 2025. The company, known for its expertise in specialty materials, is committed to addressing intricate customer problems through the development of pioneering solutions. Mativ anticipates an active engagement at the conference and appreciates the interest shown towards its operations.
